name: SONIC AUTOMOTIVE INC
summary: Sonic Automotive, Inc. is one of the largest U.S. automotive retailers, operating through three segments: Franchised Dealerships (111 stores, 134 franchises, 24 brands, 16 collision centers in 18 states), EchoPark (18 pre-owned vehicle specialty stores in 10 states), and Powersports (14 locations, 41 franchises). Services include new and used vehicle sales, Fixed Operations (parts, service, collision repair), and third-party F&I products including financing, extended warranties, and insurance.
